message:
feat(tests): add conformance tests for text output parity (beads_rust-g1ig)

Add comprehensive conformance tests comparing br vs bd text output for:
- list (empty, with issues, status/type/priority filters)
- show (normal and not_found cases)
- ready (empty, with issues, with limit)
- blocked (empty, with issues)
- stats (empty, with issues)
- orphans (empty case)

Tests use normalization to strip ANSI codes, redact IDs/timestamps/paths,
and focus on semantic differences. All tests correctly identify current
text output differences between implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
